machine_name: FANUC Built-in Spindle Motor Bis series

operation_types.name: velocity_control
operation_types.description: Standard speed control mode for machining operations with commanded spindle speeds

operation_types.name: orientation
operation_types.description: Precise positioning mode for tool changes and spindle positioning operations

operation_types.name: rigid_tapping
operation_types.description: Synchronized spindle-axis motion for tapping operations requiring precise thread cutting

operation_types.name: synchronous_control
operation_types.description: Multi-spindle synchronized operation mode for coordinated machining

subsystems.name: spindle_motor
subsystems.description: Built-in synchronous motor providing rotational power and torque

subsystems.name: bearing_system
subsystems.description: Angular contact ball bearings supporting spindle shaft with preload

subsystems.name: control_system
subsystems.description: Electronic control managing motor drive and feedback systems

subsystems.name: position_feedback
subsystems.description: Position coder system providing rotational position feedback

subsystems.name: lubrication_system
subsystems.description: Grease lubrication system for bearing protection

state_variables.name: bearing_wear
state_variables.description: Cumulative wear of bearing raceways and rolling elements from load cycles

state_variables.name: bearing_temperature
state_variables.description: Operating temperature of bearing system affecting lubrication and thermal growth

state_variables.name: preload_degradation
state_variables.description: Loss of bearing preload due to wear and thermal cycling

state_variables.name: lubrication_condition
state_variables.description: Degradation of grease properties and contamination buildup

state_variables.name: motor_temperature
state_variables.description: Motor winding and rotor temperature from electrical losses and friction

state_variables.name: grease_degradation
state_variables.description: Chemical breakdown of grease lubricant from thermal and oxidative stress

state_variables.name: contamination_level
state_variables.description: Accumulation of metallic particles and debris in lubrication system

state_variables.name: thermal_drift
state_variables.description: Temperature-induced changes in control system accuracy and calibration

usage_profiles.name: light_machining
usage_profiles.description: Low-load finishing operations with moderate speeds and minimal cutting forces

usage_profiles.name: production_machining
usage_profiles.description: Standard production operations with mixed cutting loads and frequent tool changes

usage_profiles.name: heavy_duty
usage_profiles.description: High-load roughing operations with maximum cutting forces and continuous operation

field_generation_rules.generation_logic: Commanded speed based on operation type and machining requirements, clamped by maximum_motor_speed parameter
Command speed minus velocity error, with noise from bearing condition and load variations
Torque required to maintain speed under cutting load, limited by torque_limitation_active
Positioning accuracy degraded by bearing condition and thermal effects
Speed following error increased by bearing friction and load disturbances
Synchronization error in multi-axis operations affected by mechanical condition
RMS vibration velocity 10-2000Hz reflecting bearing condition and lubrication state
RMS vibration acceleration 2-20kHz indicating bearing defects and contamination
Motor temperature from electrical losses plus bearing friction heat
Motor current proportional to torque demand plus friction losses
Time to complete orientation affected by bearing friction and positioning accuracy
Acceleration/deceleration time increased by bearing friction and thermal effects
Boolean indicating if actual speed is within arrival detection threshold of command
Boolean indicating motor has stopped based on speed detection threshold
Boolean indicating successful orientation within position tolerance
Boolean alarm triggered by excessive temperature, errors, or vibration levels

maintenance_model.effect_on_state: resets grease_degradation and contamination_level, partially restores lubrication_condition
resets bearing_wear, preload_degradation, lubrication_condition, and contamination_level

failure_model.trigger_conditions: bearing_wear > critical_threshold OR vibration_velocity > 10.7 mm/s OR motor_temperature > 150C

event_timing_model.notes: Events triggered by machining operations with thermal cycling between operations affecting degradation rates

null_field_rules.reason: Orientation-specific fields not applicable during velocity control mode
Synchronous error only relevant for multi-spindle synchronous operations
Orientation time not measured during rigid tapping operations
